grade.description: Numeric score from 0 (poor) to 10 (excellent) for overall job quality.

summary.description: Short verdict in one or two sentences: state the main strengths and weaknesses that drive the grade.

prompt.description: One or two sentences on whether the original prompt was clear, scoped, and actionable for the agent.

result.description: One or two sentences on whether the final answer or conclusion was correct, complete, and well supported.

logic.description: One or two sentences explaining the key reasoning behind the grade, citing prompt, analysis, and conclusion quality.
